title: Unique Weapons
description: Retextures swords and axes to be unique to each other
body:
Retextures swords and axes to be unique to each other with textures that are based on historical designs

Certain enchantments on specific items will change its texture (opted for enchantment variants because named variants always felt unnatural to me)(recommended to turn off enchant glint)

Past versions and full list of weapon variants are available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/unique-weapons)
